answers.kiosk-layout: Name search → select your name → enter PIN to confirm (two-step: find yourself, prove it's you)
answers.first-time-flow: Enter 1111 → system detects first use → forces PIN change immediately before clocking in
answers.pin-storage: Reversible encryption on staff table (pin_encrypted column) so managers can see/reset
answers.forgot-pin: Manager resets to 1111 from dashboard → staff must change on next use
answers.feedback: Big green/red flash with name + 'Eingestempelt'/'Ausgestempelt' → auto-clears after 3 seconds
answers.security: Dedicated kiosk user account with minimal permissions, always logged in on iPad
answers.dashboard-pin-management: Reset to 1111 + indicator showing who's still on default PIN
